title: urostigma nymphifolium
intro: Urostigma nymphifolium, also known as the Nephelium ramboutan-ake, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Urostigma nymphifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
